patch.value: As a maintainer tuning relevance, I want a golden-query eval harness, so that I can catch ranking regressions before release
As a maintainer tuning relevance, I want a golden-query eval harness, so that I can catch ranking regressions before release
tests/search-eval fixtures scored via nDCG@5; per-fixture pass/fail; optional non-blocking CI gate; seeded with real corpus queries

A relevance/ranking change can be validated against a stored baseline before release: regressions surface as a measurable nDCG@5 drop on the golden-query set, and the maintainer gets a clear per-query pass/fail signal. (Implemented by the eval-harness task pm-22x2, which owns the fixture format and runner.)
